anatomy.description: Square wrapper with equal width and height. Uses rounded-full border-radius, rendering as a perfect circle. Carries a white neutral surface background and a drop shadow that creates the floating appearance.
A single centered icon. 24×24px confirmed for md. Communicates the action without a visible label.

variants.note: No type variants. Button Floating has a single visual style: white surface with elevation shadow.

sizes.name: md
sizes.note: Default size. Use in standard map/content surfaces.

sizes.name: lg
sizes.note: Larger size. Use for more prominent or hero-level floating actions. Note: 54px, not 56px.

stateNote: No hover state. This component is designed primarily for touch/mobile contexts.

shape.note: Border is transparent at rest. Square container + rounded-full = perfect circle.

elevation.description: Drop shadow that lifts the button visually above the surface beneath it.

background.description: White neutral surface. Not a button fill token — the floating button sits on top of content.

accessibilityRequirements.ariaLabel: Required on every instance. No visible label.
accessibilityRequirements.tooltip: TODO: Confirm whether a tooltip is required or recommended.
accessibilityRequirements.ariaHidden: The icon element should be aria-hidden when the button carries an aria-label.

usageContext: Floats over a map, image, or content surface.
Used for a single, contextual action related to the surface below (e.g., re-center map, GPS lock).
Typically positioned at a fixed corner of the content area.
notes: No type variants — single visual style only.
No hover state in Figma — designed for touch/mobile-first contexts.
lg size is 54×54px (not 56px as in the standard Button and Button Icon).
